name: HWR_JOB_STATUS
description: This job table stores jobs that run for connectors.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the job table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the source ID related with the job.

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: A flag indicating if the Job is active. Use Y for active or N for inactive

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the  job.

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the job.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the full description of the job.

columns.Name: JOB_UUID
columns.Comments: This is the UUID of the job.

columns.Name: JOB_STATUS
columns.Comments: This is the current status of the job.

columns.Name: LAST_RUN
columns.Comments: This is the last run timestamp of the job.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE
columns.Comments: This is the schedule information of the job.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
